intro: A psychological horror tale born from desperation.
description:
In the aftermath of the ruined world left behind by World War III, humanity has been pushed to its final limits. With crops gone and animals extinct, survival depends on the government's most feared mandate: the Sustainable Meat Act. Every family must make a "contribution". No exceptions.

Take on the role of Marco, a father trying to protect what remains of his life. What starts as a quiet visit with family gradually turns into a nightmare of suspicion, memory loss, and unspeakable horrors lurking in the darkness. In this first-person, VHS-style experience, every hallway, every whisper, and every flicker of light pulls you deeper into a reality you’re not sure you can trust.

Key features:
• Psychological Horror: Navigate a crumbling world where truth, guilt, and imagination converge.
• Disturbing Atmosphere: An ordinary home becomes the setting for the unimaginable.
• First-Person Immersion: Explore, interact, and uncover the truth through tense, claustrophobic gameplay.
• Choices and Consequences: Your decisions will shape Marco’s fate and determine the cost of your "contribution".

Every contribution has a cost. Are you ready to pay it?
